ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the resource */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the resource has received */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the resource is active */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who uploaded the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the resource */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the resource */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the resource */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the resource */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the resource */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the category is active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the author is active */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "num_resources" INTEGER /* Number of resources uploaded by the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., learner, educator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "num_logins" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the resource */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the resource as a favorite */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource marked as a favorite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was marked as a favorite */,
  "favorite_type" TEXT /* Type of favorite (e.g., resource, list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curated_lists" (
  "list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curated list */,
  "list_name" TEXT /* Name of the curated list */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the curated list */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the list */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the list was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the list was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the list is active */,
  "list_type" TEXT /* Type of list (e.g., public, private) */,
  "num_subscribers" INTEGER /* Number of users subscribed to the list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_curated_lists_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "list_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each list item */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the curated list the item belongs to */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource in the list */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the resource in the list */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was added to the list */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item (e.g., resource, sub-list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_list_items_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES curated_lists ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_list_items_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)
